title: phymatopteris tibetana
intro: Phymatopteris tibetana, also known as Tibetan maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phymatopteris tibetana include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or tea, and is also used in the form of extracts or capsules in modern medicine.
